languages.text: Следы давней битвы указывают на столкновение между некими ксеносами и экспедицией Себериана фон Валанциуса. Однако принял ли он последний бой именно здесь — остается загадкой.
languages.translation_comment: Если нашел три улики и НЕ прокинул чек Логики; говорящий — сам РТ.

languages.text: Traces of a battle long ago indicate a confrontation between some xenos and the expedition of Seberian von Valancius. Was this the place where he fought his last battle? That remains a mystery.
languages.original_text: Следы давней битвы указывают на столкновение между некими ксеносами и экспедицией Себериана фон Валанциуса. Однако принял ли он последний бой именно здесь — остается загадкой.

traits.locale_text: Traces of a battle long ago indicate a confrontation between some xenos and the expedition of Seberian von Valancius. Was this the place where he fought his last battle? That remains a mystery.
Traces of a battle long ago indicate a confrontation between some xenos and the expedition of Seberian von Valancius. Was this the place where he fought his last battle? That remains a mystery.
Traces of a battle long ago indicate a confrontation between some xenos and the expedition of Seberian von Valancius. Was this the place where he fought his last battle? That remains a mystery.

languages.text: 古くからの戦いの痕跡は、異種族とシベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウスの遠征隊の対決を示している。彼が最後の戦いを繰り広げた場所なのかは、謎のまま。
languages.original_text: Traces of a battle long ago indicate a confrontation between some xenos and the expedition of Seberian von Valancius. Was this the place where he fought his last battle? That remains a mystery.

traits.locale_text: 古くからの戦いの痕跡は、異種族とシベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウスの遠征隊の対決を示している。彼が最後の戦いを繰り広げた場所なのかは、謎のまま。

languages.text: Uzun zaman önceki bir savaşın izleri, bazı zenolar ile Seberian von Valancius'un keşif heyeti arasında bir çatışmaya işaret ediyor. Son savaşını burada mı vermiş? Bu, gizemini korumaya devam ediyor.
languages.original_text: Traces of a battle long ago indicate a confrontation between some xenos and the expedition of Seberian von Valancius. Was this the place where he fought his last battle? That remains a mystery.

traits.locale_text: Uzun zaman önceki bir savaşın izleri, bazı zenolar ile Seberian von Valancius'un keşif heyeti arasında bir çatışmaya işaret ediyor. Son savaşını burada mı vermiş? Bu, gizemini korumaya devam ediyor.

languages.text: Restos de un enfrentamiento que tuvo lugar hace mucho tiempo entre unos xenos y la expedición de Seberian von Valancius. ¿Fue este el escenario de su última batalla? Es un misterio.
languages.original_text: Traces of a battle long ago indicate a confrontation between some xenos and the expedition of Seberian von Valancius. Was this the place where he fought his last battle? That remains a mystery.

traits.locale_text: Restos de un enfrentamiento que tuvo lugar hace mucho tiempo entre unos xenos y la expedición de Seberian von Valancius. ¿Fue este el escenario de su última batalla? Es un misterio.

languages.text: 古老的战斗痕迹表明，塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯的远征队曾在这里与某种异形激烈对峙。这里是他最后一战的战场吗？无人能够解答。
languages.original_text: Traces of a battle long ago indicate a confrontation between some xenos and the expedition of Seberian von Valancius. Was this the place where he fought his last battle? That remains a mystery.

traits.locale_text: 古老的战斗痕迹表明，塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯的远征队曾在这里与某种异形激烈对峙。这里是他最后一战的战场吗？无人能够解答。

languages.text: Les traces d'une ancienne bataille indiquent qu'une confrontation a eu lieu entre des xénos et l'expédition de Seberian von Valancius. Serait-ce ici qu'il a livré son dernier combat ? Mystère.
languages.original_text: Traces of a battle long ago indicate a confrontation between some xenos and the expedition of Seberian von Valancius. Was this the place where he fought his last battle? That remains a mystery.

traits.locale_text: Les traces d'une ancienne bataille indiquent qu'une confrontation a eu lieu entre des xénos et l'expédition de Seberian von Valancius. Serait-ce ici qu'il a livré son dernier combat ? Mystère.

languages.text: Alte Spuren eines Kampfes deuten auf eine Konfrontation der Expedition von Seberian von Valancius mit einigen Xenos hin. Hat er hier seine letzte Schlacht geschlagen? Das bleibt ein Mysterium.
languages.original_text: Traces of a battle long ago indicate a confrontation between some xenos and the expedition of Seberian von Valancius. Was this the place where he fought his last battle? That remains a mystery.

traits.locale_text: Alte Spuren eines Kampfes deuten auf eine Konfrontation der Expedition von Seberian von Valancius mit einigen Xenos hin. Hat er hier seine letzte Schlacht geschlagen? Das bleibt ein Mysterium.
